exercise_requirement: Compare SGD, RMSprop, Adam, and AdamW across predefined learning rates; include schedule and early-stopping variants.
research_question: Which optimizer and learning-rate policy gives the best validation performance and stability under a fixed architecture?
hypothesis: Adaptive optimizers will converge faster on the compact dataset, while a controlled schedule may improve stability.
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
